rationale: Educ. Code §32.301 establishes a discretionary technology lending grant program. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The commissioner may establish a grant program under which grants are awarded to school districts and open-enrollment charter schools to implement a technology lending program
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this technology lending grant statute.
